summary: Portable update flow validated end-to-end Windows + Linux across 0.0.3->0.0.4->0.0.5->0.0.6: offline + online update, exec-bit self-heal, no-curl bundled-Electron updater. User-verified on Linux (offline-bridge to 0.0.6, launchers stay executable). macOS untested. Moved doing->done.
Online-update test recorded: Win+Linux PASS end-to-end, Mac PASS-to-API-boundary (rental-IP rate limit only). Updater rate-limit hardening added (53dc973).
